mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM heritage_inheritor i INNER JOIN heritage_project p ON i.project_id = p.project_id
AND i.status = 1 AND p.status = 1
AND i.project_id = #{query.projectId}
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')

SELECT i.inheritor_id AS inheritorId, i.name, i.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, i.years, i.intro, i.avatar FROM heritage_inheritor i INNER JOIN heritage_project p ON i.project_id = p.project_id WHERE i.inheritor_id = #{inheritorId} AND i.status = 1 AND p.status = 1

SELECT 'inheritor' AS type, i.inheritor_id AS id, i.name AS name, NULL AS area, p.project_name AS projectName, LEFT(i.intro, 80) AS description FROM heritage_inheritor i INNER JOIN heritage_project p ON i.project_id = p.project_id WHERE i.status = 1 AND p.status = 1 AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY i.inheritor_id DESC
